description_long: This is a heavily equipped adult figure dressed in full modern military gear, including a tactical helmet with mounted accessories, protective goggles, and a face covering. The individual wears a multi-pocketed tactical vest loaded with pouches, ammunition, and gear, as well as a large backpack with visible straps and attachments. The uniform consists of long-sleeved tactical clothing and reinforced pants, with knee pads and sturdy combat boots. A sidearm is holstered on the right thigh, and various utility items are attached to the belt and vest. The figure's hands are gloved and extended slightly outward, and the overall appearance is that of a prepared urban soldier or special forces operative. The gear and accessories suggest readiness for urban operations, with a focus on protection, mobility, and carrying capacity.
description: A fully equipped adult in modern military gear with helmet, tactical vest, backpack, and combat boots, prepared for urban operations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tactical vest, helmet with mounted gear, face covering, and holstered sidearm on the right thigh.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the helmet, backpack, and the extended arm, with visible gear attachments.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the large backpack, back of the helmet, and multiple pouches and equipment attached to the belt.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the holstered sidearm, side profile of the backpack, and tactical gear on the vest and belt.
attribute_clothing_type: full tactical military uniform with helmet, protective vest, gloves, and reinforced pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
